docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
Welcome to our project!

This page provides information about our project, its mission, and the team behind it.

docs.title: Mission
docs.text: Our goal is to create high-quality, open-source software that makes a difference in the community. We strive for excellence through collaboration and continual improvement.

docs.title: Team
docs.text: Our team consists of professionals from various fields who work together to build and maintain the project. Each member brings unique skills and a shared passion for innovation.

docs.title: Get Involved
docs.text:
If you are interested in contributing, please visit our Contributing Guidelines and get started today.

Thank you for your support!
